issue_title: ff - breadcrumb route to component source not getting picked up
issue_body_preview: https://github.com/noflo/noflo-ui/blob/cd392fd2ad5f1a557c1a930da15bf6e9a5e20585/elements/noflo-context.html#L126 is setting the window hash, but not showing the component editor. Opening from project panel works.
test_description_zh: 在面包屑导航中，点击指向组件源码的路由链接，观察是否能正确导航并显示组件编辑器界面。对比从项目面板中打开同一组件的行为。
expected_result_zh: 通过面包屑导航点击组件源码链接后，应正确跳转并显示组件编辑器界面，行为与从项目面板打开组件时一致。
